description: Triggers for UI styling work with shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, responsive layouts, dark mode, accessibility, and canvas design

queries.query: Style this data table with sorting and pagination using shadcn/ui
Add dark mode to my Next.js app with Tailwind CSS
Create a responsive layout for my product page — two columns on desktop, stacked on mobile
Build an accessible contact form with inline validation
Implement design tokens from our design system in Tailwind CSS
Style a shadcn UI card component with hover effects
Create a canvas poster at 1200x628px for our social media campaign
Style this component using Tailwind CSS utility classes only
Implement a consistent button component with all interaction states
Apply Tailwind responsive breakpoints to make this layout mobile-friendly
Write a Python class to handle database connections
Create a Docker container for my Node.js API
Optimize my PostgreSQL query for better performance
Help me prepare a salary negotiation pitch
Summarize this academic paper on neural networks
